Home / Services / Window Repair Services

Window Repair Services

Extend the life of your windows with our expert repair and maintenance services.

Ocean Sash and Door offers comprehensive window repair services to address a wide range of issues, from cracked glass and broken hardware to drafty frames and water leaks. We understand that replacing windows can be a significant investment, so we strive to provide cost-effective repair solutions that extend the life of your existing windows.

Our skilled technicians have years of experience repairing all types of windows, including wood, vinyl, aluminum, and fiberglass. We use high-quality replacement parts and proven repair techniques to ensure lasting results. We can repair or replace damaged glass, repair or replace broken locks and latches, re-glaze windows to prevent air leaks, and repair or replace damaged window frames.

Whether you have a single broken window or multiple windows in need of repair, Ocean Sash and Door is here to help. We offer prompt and reliable service, and we always provide upfront pricing before starting any work. We pride ourselves on our honest and transparent approach, and we're committed to providing you with the best possible window repair services in San Francisco.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Thorough inspection of damaged windows.
  2. 02 Step 2: Detailed repair plan and cost estimate.
  3. 03 Step 3: Professional repair or replacement of damaged components.
  4. 04 Step 4: Quality control and final inspection.

Benefits

  • Cost-effective alternative to window replacement
  • Extended window lifespan and performance
  • Improved energy efficiency and comfort
  • Enhanced home security and aesthetics

Frequently Asked Questions

Can you repair windows in historic buildings?

Yes, we have experience repairing windows in historic buildings throughout San Francisco. We understand the importance of preserving the original character of these buildings, and we use appropriate repair techniques and materials.

Do you offer emergency window repair services?

Yes, we offer emergency window repair services for situations that pose a security risk or safety hazard. Contact us for immediate assistance.

How do I know if my windows need to be repaired or replaced?

If your windows are drafty, leaking, difficult to open or close, or have visible damage, it's time to consider repair or replacement. Contact us for a professional assessment.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with window repair services? Contact us today.
